Implemented and committed as `1cd976668` (`fix: escalate repeated pre-claim warn fingerprints [ddx-c135246c]`).

What changed:
- Added a loop-level pre-claim warn streak with a default threshold of 5 and a configurable runtime override in [`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go`](file:///Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c135246c-20260527T055825-057b4d30/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go).

- Reset the streak when a candidate gets through pre-claim intake without a warn, and added helper logic for the emitted operator-attention body.
- Added regression coverage in [`cli/internal/agent/consecutive_wedge_guard_test.go`](file:///Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c135246c-20260527T055825-057b4d30/cli/internal/agent/consecutive_wedge_guard_test.go) and [`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_routing_preflight_test.go`](file:///Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-c135246c-20260527T055825-057b4d30/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_routing_preflight_test.go).
